    <item>
        <guid>nba530145</guid>
        <title>Alperen Sengun: Full stat line in Game 5 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/alperen-sengun-5404</link>
        <description>Sengun supplied 14 points (5-9 FG, 4-4 FT), nine rebounds, eight assists, two steals and one block across 43 minutes in Wednesday's 99-93 win over the Lakers in Game 5 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 29 Apr 2026 9:59:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530144</guid>
        <title>RJ Barrett: Double-doubles in Game 5 defeat</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/rj-barrett-4767</link>
        <description>Barrett tallied 25 points (9-19 FG, 2-5 3Pt, 5-9 FT), 12 rebounds and five assists in 38 minutes during Wednesday's 125-120 loss to the Cavaliers in Game 5 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 29 Apr 2026 7:25:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530143</guid>
        <title>James Harden: Scores 23 points in Game 5 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/james-harden-3018</link>
        <description>Harden produced 23 points (7-13 FG, 4-8 3Pt, 5-6 FT), nine rebounds, five assists, two steals and one block in 40 minutes during Wednesday's Game 5 win over the Raptors in the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 29 Apr 2026 7:23:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530142</guid>
        <title>Cade Cunningham: Erupts for 45 points in Game 5 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cade-cunningham-5336</link>
        <description>Cunningham posted 45 points (13-23 FG, 5-8 3Pt, 14-14 FT), five assists, four rebounds and one steal across 44 minutes in Wednesday's 116-109 win over the Magic in Game 5 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 29 Apr 2026 7:15:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530141</guid>
        <title>Paolo Banchero: Pours in 45 points in Game 5 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/paolo-banchero-5700</link>
        <description>Banchero registered 45 points (17-31 FG, 6-11 3Pt, 5-12 FT), nine rebounds, seven assists and two steals in 41 minutes during Wednesday's 116-109 loss to the Pistons in Game 5 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 29 Apr 2026 7:12:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
